description_long: This is a large commercial passenger airplane with a streamlined white fuselage and blue accents, including a blue tail fin adorned with white stars. The aircraft features four underwing turbofan engines, two on each wing, with blue engine nacelles and silver rims. The wings are low-mounted and swept back, each ending in a small upward winglet. The airplane has a conventional tail design with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers extending from the rear. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows visible, and the word 'Kirly' is printed on the side of the aircraft. The landing gear is not visible in these views, suggesting it is either retracted or not modeled.
description: A large white commercial airplane with blue tail and engines, swept low-mounted wings, and four underwing turbofan engines. The fuselage is streamlined with 'Kirly' branding and a star-patterned tail fin.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full wingspan, four blue engines, and the streamlined fuselage with the tail fin visible.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the 'Kirly' branding, blue tail with stars, and the arrangement of the engines under the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal stabilizers, and the alignment of the engines under the wings.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to view 1, showing the opposite side of the fuselage and the blue engine nacelles.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back wings with small upward winglets at the tips and no visible dihedral or anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing turbofan engines, two per wing.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear (not visible in images).
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows, likely multi-seat.
